items.briefing:
Microsoft has released its largest-ever Patch Tuesday update, fixing over 570 security flaws including vulnerabilities in SharePoint, which is widely used in Australian workplaces. IT teams should prioritise applying these updates as soon as possible. Separately, Australian critical infrastructure operators have been warned to strengthen router security following alerts about Russian cyber activity targeting network devices.

Cyber attackers are increasingly using AI to automate and improve their attacks, raising the risk for all Australian organisations. **Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Microsoft 365 or SharePoint, check with your IT team today to confirm this month's security updates have been applied.

featured.title: Australian critical infrastructure urged to tighten router security after Russian cyber warning
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure security directly impacts Australian national security and essential services.
